calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amy Shearer, Assistant District Attorney, appearing for Plaintiff PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, Telephone 415-553-9706;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S unopposed motion to compel response to Petitioner First Set of Inspection Demands, First Set of Special Interrogatories and First Set of Form Interrogatories is GRANTED.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
